context.name: Company brief
context.content:
Acme Robotics builds warehouse automation robots.
Interviewer: Dana Levi, VP Product.
They just launched the PickBot 3 line and are expanding to Europe.
My angle: 6 years PM experience, shipped two 0-to-1 logistics products.

script.text: Thanks for joining today. Tell me a little about yourself.
Sure! I have been a product manager for six years, mostly in logistics.
Interesting. How would you approach launching a hardware product in a new market?
And I would add, what metrics would you track in the first quarter?
Great questions. Let me think about the launch sequencing first.
